message:
feat: add rotating tips to all 28 dashboards (#4646)

Expand RotatingTip coverage from 3 dashboards to 28. Each dashboard
now shows a contextual "Did you know?" tip that rotates across visits,
creating variable-reward engagement (psychology Layer 8).

- Added 125 tips across 25 new page keys (5 tips per dashboard)
- Added RotatingTip via rightExtra prop to all DashboardPage and
  DashboardHeader components
- Tips fire ksc_tip_shown GA4 event for engagement tracking
- Skipped GPUReservations (custom layout, no DashboardPage)

Addresses: #3791

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
